title: Pride in Place Strategy
body: "The Pride in Place Strategy is the government‘s plan to create safer, healthier neighbourhoods where communities can thrive. It sets out how we will deliver a step change in how we support communities across the country and provide long-term funding to the most doubly disadvantaged areas.  Our Pride in Place Strategy has been developed in consultation with communities and local people. It represents a break from the past, a new way for government to work in partnership with communities and neighbourhoods, empowering them with the tools and levers to drive meaningful change that reflects their priorities. "
